mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM content WHERE biz_type = 'culture'
AND category = #{category}
SELECT id, title, content, cover, create_time, category, view_count, like_count FROM content WHERE id = #{id} AND biz_type = 'culture'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO content ( title, biz_type, biz_id, type, content, media_url, cover, view_count, like_count, category ) VALUES ( #{title}, #{bizType}, #{bizId}, #{type}, #{content}, #{mediaUrl}, #{cover}, #{viewCount}, #{likeCount}, #{category} )
mapper.update: UPDATE content SET title = #{title}, biz_type = #{bizType}, biz_id = #{bizId}, type = #{type}, content = #{content}, media_url = #{mediaUrl}, cover = #{cover}, view_count = #{viewCount}, like_count = #{likeCount}, category = #{category} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE content SET like_count = like_count - 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND like_count > 0
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM content WHERE id = #{id} AND biz_type = 'culture'
mapper.select: SELECT MIN(id) as id, category as name, '🔥' as icon, COUNT(*) as count FROM content WHERE biz_type = 'culture' AND category IS NOT NULL AND category != '' GROUP BY category ORDER BY count DESC
SELECT id, title, content, cover, create_time, category, view_count, like_count FROM content WHERE biz_type = 'culture' ORDER BY view_count DESC, create_time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT id, title, content, cover, create_time, category, view_count, like_count FROM content WHERE biz_type = 'culture' ORDER BY view_count DESC LIMIT #{size}
SELECT id, title, content, cover, create_time, category, view_count, like_count FROM content WHERE biz_type = 'culture' ORDER BY like_count DESC, create_time DESC LIMIT #{size}
SELECT id, title, content, cover, create_time, category, view_count, like_count FROM content WHERE biz_type = 'culture' AND type = 'video' ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{size}
SELECT stat_date as date, drama_count as dramaCount, (content_count - drama_count) as cultureCount FROM daily_stats WHERE stat_date >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) ORDER BY stat_date ASC
